passives.desc: Turn Start: Activate the highest-Stacked state of time between [StackPastActivate], [StackPresentActivate], and [StackFutureActivate] and use a special Skill - If multiple states of time share the highest Stack, the currently active state of time does not change - Inactive states of time become [StackPast], [StackPresent], or [StackFuture], respectively - When the currently active state of time changes, gain 1 [TimeGap] Every time Illusory Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::The Past / The Present / The Future are hit as main targets, Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago loses [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] Stack Higher [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] Stacks lead to Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::Imago's Skill Power and damage output becoming greatly enhanced, and greatly increase the amount of status effects it inflicts or gains
passives.name: Moment of Entangled Lives

passives.desc: At 10+ Clashes against the same target, randomly gain or lose Clash Power by (Clash Count / 10) in a Clash (rounded down) Encounter Start: - Begin Encounter with the same HP as Butterfly[TabExplain] of Entangled Lives::The Pupa (excluding Shield) - Gain 10 Stacks each of [StackPastActivate] / [StackPresentActivate] / [StackFutureActivate] At less than 66%/33% HP, gain new Slot patterns - When this unit's HP drops below 66%/33% for the first time in this Encounter, gain 10 Stacks each of [StackPastActivate], [StackPresentActivate], and [StackFutureActivate] next turn
passives.name: Causality that Threads the Past, the Present, and the Future [三世因果]

passives.desc:
When [StackPastActivate], gain the following effects:
- When hit by Sinners, inflict 1 [Combustion] and +1 [Combustion] Count on the
attacking Sinner
- Skill "Kalpāgni" gains Final Power +2 and its final Coin gains "On Hit,
inflict ([StackPastActivate] Stack / 2) SP damage (rounded down)" effect
- Turn Start: Inflict 5 [TakeHpHealReduce] and 3 [CrimsonTakeDamageUp] on all Sinners who have 10+ ([Combustion] Potency + [Combustion] Count)
passives.name: Past [過去]

passives.desc:
When [StackPresentActivate], gain the following effects:
- Does not lose [Breath] Count On Crit; Turn Start: gain (2 + # of Sinners) [Breath] and [Breath] Count
- Skill "Smite the Wicked" gains Final Power +2 and its final Coin gains "On Hit, raise Stagger Threshold by ([StackPresentActivate] Stack / 2) (rounded down)" effect
- On Hit, deal +(([Breath] Potency on self + [Breath] Count on self) x 2)% damage on Critical Hit (max 120%; on Clash Lose, apply only one-third of the effect's full value)
passives.name: Present [現在]

passives.desc:
When [StackFutureActivate], gain the following effects:
- Turn Start: All Sinners gain +(3 + # of current turn / 2) [Laceration] Count (rounded up)
- Skill "Bloodflower" gains Final Power +2 and its final Coin gains "On Hit,
heal ([StackFutureActivate] Stack x 3) HP on self" effect
- Whenever [Laceration] activates on self or on Sinners, heal HP equal to the said [Laceration] damage (rounded down)
